---
title: "Activities"
author: "Bill Perry"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    downloads: []
    embed-resources: false
    self-contained: false

listing:
  contents: "*_activity/*.qmd"   # matches WW_MM_<slug>_activity folders
  type: table
  sort: "order asc"              # sorts by the `order:` field in each qmd, not by title
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: false              # no clickable filter chips (matches data science site)
  fields: [order, week, title, description]
  field-display-names:
    order: "Activity #"
    week: "Week"
    title: "Activity"
    description: "Description"
  field-types:
    order: number
---

Every activity below pulls its number, week, title, and description straight from
that file's YAML frontmatter — nothing on this page is hand-typed. Ordering comes
from the `order:` field, which the `sync_order_from_folder_names.R` pre-render hook
fills in automatically from each folder's `WW_MM_` number prefix.
